subject: Groww Weekly Review Pulse — 2026-W25
html_body:
Hello team,

The Groww Weekly Review Pulse report for 2026-W25 is now available.

Key highlights (top themes):

  • Poor User Experience and Transparency: Customers are experiencing difficulties with the app's functionality, transparency, and customer support, leading to frustration and mistrust. Issues include unclear account statements, unresponsive customer support, and technical problems with trading and account management.
  • Technical Issues and Poor Customer Support: Customers are experiencing various technical issues with the Groww app, including incorrect order execution, app crashes, and poor customer support, resulting in financial losses and frustration. These issues are leading to a loss of trust in the platform.
  • App Stability and Performance: Customers are experiencing issues with the app's stability, layout changes, and glitches, which are affecting their trading experience. Many are requesting a rollback to a previous version or improvements to the current app.
  • High and Hidden Charges: Customers are unhappy with the high and unclear charges on the Groww app, feeling misled by advertised pricing. They demand more transparency in the fee structure.
  • Trading Experience: Customers have mixed reviews about their trading experience with Groww, with some facing issues and others having a smooth experience. The feedback highlights both positive and negative aspects of the app's features and services.

You can read the full report including real user quotes and action ideas in the Google Doc:

Read Full Report

Best regards,
Pulse Agent
